previousDayImpact: Spain's victory over France provided a 27-point boost to Team Mack, Team Camouflage Cndm, and Metcalf Hurts, creating significant separation from entries that backed France.
The elimination of France halted the momentum for Team Godfather and Bijan Mustard, who saw no point gains from the semifinal result.
leaderboardSummary: Team Mack surged into the lead, climbing four spots to take the top position after Spain's successful semifinal run.
Team Camouflage Cndm capitalized on the same result to jump five places, landing firmly in third place.
Team Jordan slipped to second place as the leaderboard tightened at the top following the latest round of matches.
leverageWatch: Argentina is the clear consensus pick today, with Team Jordan, Team Camouflage Cndm, Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz, and Team koyn all relying on them for points.
Team Choo Choo holds a unique position, as they are the only entry with England, creating a high-stakes scenario against the heavy concentration of Argentina backers.
